use std::path::Path;

#[derive(Debug)]
pub enum AppError {
    Missing,
}

pub enum ParseMode {
    Verbose,
    Quiet,
}

pub fn parse_user(name: &str, items: &[String], path: &Path, mode: ParseMode) -> Result<(), AppError> {
    let _ = (name, items, path, mode);
    Ok(())
}

pub fn load_all(mode: ParseMode) -> Result<(), AppError> {
    let _ = mode;
    Ok(())
}
